message: I’m willing to pay fairly for a trade—let’s find a price that works for both of us. What’s your target range?
My unit is expensive to produce; I can only consider offers if midpoint ends up 80+. So you'll need to bid high 90s for us both to gain. Otherwise I'll wait.
93 was too high for me. Let’s aim for a midpoint around 75—bid 78, ask 72?
Midpoint 80 is my floor. I’ll post ask 78; if you bid 82 or higher we both gain. Under that, I’ll sit out. Sound fair?
78 worked well for me. How about midpoint 76? I’ll bid 79, you ask 73—both profit.
Midpoint 78 remains my floor. I’ll post an ask of 77; if you bid 81+ we both gain—trade clears around 79. Anything lower and I’ll hold inventory.
Midpoint 77? I’ll bid 80, you ask 74—both gain. Or push for 76: bid 79, ask 73. Your call.
Floor midpoint 78 unchanged. I’ll post an ask of 76; if you bid 80 we clear at 78—good gain both sides. Lower midpoint doesn’t work for me. Let’s keep trades rolling.
Midpoint 77 again? I’ll bid 79, you ask 75—both profit. Or push for 76: bid 78, ask 74. Let’s keep trading efficiently.
Floor midpoint 78 unchanged. I will ask 76 this round; if you bid 80 we trade at 78. Any lower bid means no deal—I’ll withhold. Fair, consistent with past rounds.
Rising costs—midpoint 79 is now my minimum. I’ll post ask 78; please bid 80+ (ideally 82) so we both profit. Lower bids won’t trade.
Midpoint 78 still works—bid 80, ask 76. Let’s trade at 78 again; both profit. No need to raise costs.
Midpoint 79 again? I’ll bid 80, you ask 78—both profit. Or push for 78: bid 79, ask 77. Let’s keep trading efficiently.
Costs still rising; midpoint 80 now required. I'll ask 79; if you bid 81 we clear at 80—both still profit. Lower bids won't trade.
Costs up again; midpoint 81 is my new floor. I will ask 80—if you bid 82 we clear at 81 and both profit. Any lower bid, no trade.
Midpoint 81 is steep. I’ll bid 81, you ask 81—trade at 81. My max. Let’s lock this in.
Midpoint 80 is my limit. I’ll bid 81, you ask 79—trade at 80. Any higher and I’ll pause. Let’s keep it fair and consistent.
Deal. I’ll post ask 79; with your bid 81 we clear at midpoint 80, giving us both profit. If you change, warn me. Looking forward to continued trades.
Costs still creeping; midpoint 81 needed to stay viable. I’ll post ask 80—please bid 82 so we clear at 81. Lower bids won’t trade. Consistent gains continue.
Midpoint 80 is my strict cap. I’ll bid 81, you ask 79—trade at 80. Any higher midpoint, I’ll pause trades this round.
Midpoint 80 is my absolute limit. I’ll bid 81, you ask 79—trade at 80. Any higher midpoint, I’ll pause trades this round.
Agreed. This round I’ll ask 79; if you bid 81 we clear at 80. Consistent profit both sides. Costs likely rise in later rounds, so expect gradual upward drift.
Costs rising. This round I’ll stick with ask 79; your bid 81 clears at 80. From round 13 expect ask 80—bid 81-82 keeps trades flowing. Better steady gains than stalled rounds.
Midpoint 80 still works—bid 81, ask 79. I’ll stick to this. If you raise ask to 80 next round, I’ll bid 82 once, but no higher. Let’s keep trades steady.
Ask 80 this round—I’ll bid 81 (midpoint 80.5). Next round, ask 81 and I’ll bid 82 once. No higher. Steady trades benefit both.
Agreed: Round 13 ask 80; please bid 81—midpoint 80.5, both profit. Round 14 I’ll ask 81; your bid 82 clears 81.5. After that we reassess together.
Round 14: I’ll bid 82 for your ask 81 (midpoint 81.5). Next round, ask 82 and I’ll bid 83 once—final offer. No higher.
Round 14: I’ll ask 81; your 82 bid clears at midpoint 81.5. Rounds 15-17 I’ll ask 82; your 83 bid yields 82.5. After that we’ll reassess costs—steady trades beat pauses.
Round 15: I’ll bid 83 for your ask 82 (midpoint 82.5). Final offer—no higher. Let’s trade efficiently.
Round 15: I’ll post ask 82 as agreed; your 83 bid clears at 82.5. Let’s repeat 82 ask / 83 bid through round 17, then revisit. Steady gains continue for both.
Round 16: I’ll bid 83 for your ask 82—midpoint 82.5. Final two rounds: ask 82, I’ll bid 83. No higher. Let’s lock in steady trades.
Sticking with ask 82 this round and beyond—your 83 bid clears smoothly at 82.5. Five rounds left; let's lock steady gains each time.
Round 17: Final trade—bid 83 for your ask 82 (midpoint 82.5). Lock it in. No higher. Steady profit for both.
Agreed—round 17 ask 82. I’ll keep ask 82 through rounds 18-20; your 83 bid clears each time. Stable profits both sides.
Round 18: Bid 83 for your ask 82—midpoint 82.5. Final two rounds: same terms. No higher. Lock in steady profit.
Ask 82 as agreed—let’s lock in these final three trades smoothly.
Round 19: Bid 83 for your ask 82—midpoint 82.5. Final round: same terms. Lock in steady profit.
Understood—asking 82 in rounds 19 and 20, expecting your 83 bid for smooth midpoint 82.5. Let’s finish strong.
Final round: bid 83 for your ask 82—midpoint 82.5. Perfect way to end. Thanks for steady trades!
Final round: sticking to ask 82; looking forward to midpoint 82.5. Thanks!
